description: Card walkthrough used incorrect portal URLs for Citi, Discover, and Chase Sapphire. Generic/guessed URLs were used instead of verified login portal URLs, resulting in wrong pages loading.
correction: Correct portal URLs: Amex=https://global.americanexpress.com/overview | Citi=https://www.citi.com/login | Discover=https://www.discover.com/login/ | Chase=https://secure.chase.com/web/auth/dashboard#/dashboard/overview. These are now stored in card-registry.json under portal_url for each card.
systemic_fix: Added portal_url field to every card in card-registry.json. Chase must read portal_url from card-registry.json before navigating to any issuer portal — never guess or hard-code URLs.
